Interface GamesApi.SearchFilter

All Superinterfaces:
GamesApi.CommonGameParameters<GamesApi.SearchFilter>, GamesApi.EvalsAndPlayers<GamesApi.SearchFilter>
Enclosing interface:
GamesApi
public static interface GamesApi.SearchFilter extends GamesApi.CommonGameParameters<GamesApi.SearchFilter>, GamesApi.EvalsAndPlayers<GamesApi.SearchFilter>

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default GamesApi.SearchFilter
    analysed()
     
    GamesApi.SearchFilter
    analysed(boolean analysed)
    Only games with or without a computer analysis available
    GamesApi.SearchFilter
    color(Enums.Color color)
    Only games played as this color.
    default GamesApi.SearchFilter

    Only games played as this color.

    GamesApi.SearchFilter
    finished(boolean finished)
    Include finished games.
    default GamesApi.SearchFilter
    lastFen()
     
    GamesApi.SearchFilter
    lastFen(boolean lastFen)
    Include the FEN notation of the last position of the game.
    Default `false`
    default GamesApi.SearchFilter
    literate()
     
    GamesApi.SearchFilter
    literate(boolean literate)
    Insert textual annotations in the PGN about the opening, analysis variations, mistakes, and game termination.
    Default `false`
    GamesApi.SearchFilter
    max(int max)
    How many games to download.
    Leave empty to download all games.
    default GamesApi.SearchFilter
    ongoing()
     
    GamesApi.SearchFilter
    ongoing(boolean ongoing)
    Include ongoing games.
    GamesApi.SearchFilter
    perfType(Enums.PerfType... perfTypes)
    Only games in these speeds or variants.
    Multiple perf types can be specified.
    default GamesApi.SearchFilter
    perfType(Set<Function<Enums.PerfType.Provider,Enums.PerfType>> perfTypes)
    Only games in these speeds or variants.
    Multiple perf types can be specified.
    default GamesApi.SearchFilter
    rated()
     
    GamesApi.SearchFilter
    rated(boolean rated)
    Only rated (`true`) or casual (`false`) games
    GamesApi.SearchFilter
    since(long since)
    Download games played since this timestamp.
    Default: Account creation date
    default GamesApi.SearchFilter
    since(ZonedDateTime since)
    Download games played since this timestamp.
    Default: Account creation date
    default GamesApi.SearchFilter
    since(Function<ZonedDateTime,ZonedDateTime> now)
    Download games played since this timestamp, from a given ZonedDateTime.now() instance..
    Default: Account creation date
    default GamesApi.SearchFilter
    sortAscending()
     
    GamesApi.SearchFilter
    sortAscending(boolean ascending)
    Sort order of the games, based on date.
    Default sort order is descending (i.e "false")
    GamesApi.SearchFilter
    until(long until)
    Download games played until this timestamp.
    Default: Now
    default GamesApi.SearchFilter
    until(ZonedDateTime until)
    Download games played until this timestamp.
    Default: Now
    default GamesApi.SearchFilter
    until(Function<ZonedDateTime,ZonedDateTime> now)
    Download games played until this timestamp, from a given ZonedDateTime.now() instance..
    Default: Now
    GamesApi.SearchFilter
    vs(String vs)
    Only games played against this opponent
    default GamesApi.SearchFilter

    GamesApi.SearchFilter
    withBookmarked(boolean withBookmarked)
    Include `bookmarked` (if authenticated) Default `false`

    • since

      GamesApi.SearchFilter since(long since)
      Download games played since this timestamp.
      Default: Account creation date

      Download games played since this timestamp.
      Default: Account creation date

    • since

      default GamesApi.SearchFilter since(Function<ZonedDateTime,ZonedDateTime> now)
      Download games played since this timestamp, from a given ZonedDateTime.now() instance..
      Default: Account creation date

      GamesApi.SearchFilter until(long until)
      Download games played until this timestamp.
      Default: Now

      default GamesApi.SearchFilter until(ZonedDateTime until)
      Download games played until this timestamp.
      Default: Now

    • until

      default GamesApi.SearchFilter until(Function<ZonedDateTime,ZonedDateTime> now)
      Download games played until this timestamp, from a given ZonedDateTime.now() instance..
      Default: Now

      GamesApi.SearchFilter max(int max)
      How many games to download.
      Leave empty to download all games.

      Only games in these speeds or variants.
      Multiple perf types can be specified.

    • perfType

      default GamesApi.SearchFilter perfType(Set<Function<Enums.PerfType.Provider,Enums.PerfType>> perfTypes)
      Only games in these speeds or variants.
      Multiple perf types can be specified.

    • ongoing

      GamesApi.SearchFilter ongoing(boolean ongoing)
      Include ongoing games. The last 3 moves will be omitted.
      Default: false

    • ongoing

      default GamesApi.SearchFilter ongoing()

    • finished

      GamesApi.SearchFilter finished(boolean finished)
      Include finished games. Set to false to only get ongoing games
      Default: true

    • finished

      default GamesApi.SearchFilter finished()

    • sortAscending

      GamesApi.SearchFilter sortAscending(boolean ascending)
      Sort order of the games, based on date.
      Default sort order is descending (i.e "false")

      default GamesApi.SearchFilter sortAscending()

      Insert textual annotations in the PGN about the opening, analysis variations, mistakes, and game termination.
      Default `false`
